<!-- GENERATED by scripts/generate-api-reference.mjs — do not edit by hand. Run `npm run docs:api`. -->

# MCP Tools

Gateway registers 161 `gateway_*` MCP tools. Tool names are registered in `src/mcp.ts` without the `gateway_` prefix; OpenCode exposes them as `gateway_<name>`.

Use the `gateway_catalog` tool at runtime for the reachable subset enabled by that server's active tier.

Tools are bounded by the `GATEWAY_MCP_TOOLS` tier (`read` ⊂ `operate` ⊂ `admin`, default `operate`); the **Tier** column is the minimum tier that exposes each tool. The default `operate` surface gives the single-operator agent every day-to-day workflow tool — including the composite `gateway_plan_initiative`, `gateway_dispatch_now` (operate), and `gateway_triage` (read) — while admin/config, asset mutation, restart, restore, and delete stay opt-in behind `GATEWAY_MCP_TOOLS=admin`. See [MCP tool tiers](../operations/security.md) for the model.

The machine-readable HTTP contract is published at [`openapi.json`](openapi.json).

Gateway Method language maps Initiative to the `gateway_roadmap_*` tools and Issue to the `gateway_task_*` tools; those names are stable compatibility contracts and are not renamed.

## Discovery

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_catalog` | read | List the grouped Gateway MCP tool inventory with each tool's group, tier, and purpose for in-band discovery. |

## Composite Workflows

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_plan_initiative` | operate | One atomic call: create an Initiative + its Issues + dependency edges (+ optional supervisor). Replaces roadmap_create_with_tasks + N task_dependency_add (+ supervisor_create). |

## Dashboards and Observability

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_dashboard` | read | Text dashboard: health, scheduler, Issues, Initiatives, runs, sessions, and pending OpenCode requests. |
| `gateway_briefing` | read | Latest main-agent briefing: changed work, active runs, blockers, gates, completions, alerts, and next actions. |
| `gateway_observability` | read | Session, token, cost, and per-agent execution trace summary from observability artifacts. |
| `gateway_roadmap_supervisor_observability` | read | Initiative Supervisor health, due/leased state, last results, and recent supervisor audit events. |
| `gateway_health` | read | Daemon health, scheduler config, and queue counts. |
| `gateway_doctor` | read | Deterministic Gateway diagnostic report. |
| `gateway_readiness` | read | Local operating readiness state, checks, and operating mode. |
| `gateway_governance` | read | Budget, quota, token, cost, and runtime governance status. |
| `gateway_attention` | read | Unified Needs Attention across Gateway gates, tasks, runs, and OpenCode-native requests. |
| `gateway_triage` | read | One read for the whole operator attention set: gates, questions, permissions, blocked tasks, stale runs, completion proposals, and active alerts. Start here. |
| `gateway_alerts` | read | Active alerts with severity, evidence, and next actions. |
| `gateway_alert_action` | operate | Acknowledge, resolve, or suppress a Gateway alert. |
| `gateway_incident_report` | read | Generate a local incident report from alert lifecycle and workflow events. |
| `gateway_logs` | read | Read recent Gateway daemon log lines. |
| `gateway_work_events` | read | List recent Gateway-owned workflow events. |

## Run Analytics and Scorecards

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_analytics_summary` | read | Run-history spend/usage by profile, agent, or roadmap with outcome distribution, retry hotspots, and budget trend over a bounded window. |
| `gateway_analytics_scorecard` | read | Per-profile/agent completion + cost scorecard (completion rate, avg attempts, cost-per-completed-task) with derived underperformers, an errored-run error-class breakdown (operational/external/genuine/unknown), and the genuine-failure-rate over a window. |

## Human Loop and OpenCode Requests

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_human_gate_list` | read | List Gateway-level human approval gates. |
| `gateway_human_gate_create` | operate | Create a durable Gateway human gate for a task, run, stage, or roadmap decision. |
| `gateway_human_gate_decide` | operate | Approve or reject a Gateway human gate with once/always scope and audit trail. |
| `gateway_question_list` | read | List pending OpenCode-native questions. |
| `gateway_question_reply` | operate | Reply to an OpenCode-native question. |
| `gateway_question_reject` | operate | Reject an OpenCode-native question. |
| `gateway_permission_list` | read | List pending OpenCode-native permission requests. |
| `gateway_permission_reply` | admin | Approve or reject an OpenCode-native permission request. Approval is admin-tier because it grants OpenCode shell/edit capability. |
| `gateway_permission_reject` | operate | Reject an OpenCode-native permission request without granting shell/edit capability. |

## Service and Config

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_config_get` | read | Read Gateway configuration with secrets redacted. |
| `gateway_config_update` | admin | Patch Gateway config; destructive approval gating may require an approvedGateId retry. |
| `gateway_restart` | admin | Request Gateway daemon restart (admin tier, audited; no human gate). |

## Backup and Ops

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_backup_create` | admin | Create a timestamped Gateway state backup; refuses active runs unless allowActiveRuns=true. |
| `gateway_backup_list` | read | List Gateway state backups and verification status. |
| `gateway_backup_verify` | admin | Verify a backup checksum, metadata, and SQLite integrity. |
| `gateway_recovery_drill` | admin | Restore a backup into isolated state and write scheduler/storage/channel recovery evidence. |
| `gateway_state_export` | admin | Export durable Gateway state as JSON for audit or machine transfer. |
| `gateway_restore` | admin | Restore state from a verified backup (maintenanceMode + destructive approval). |

## Scheduler, Profiles, and Promotion

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_scheduler_status` | read | Scheduler configuration and queue counts. |
| `gateway_scheduler_pause` | operate | Pause the Gateway scheduler. |
| `gateway_scheduler_resume` | operate | Resume the Gateway scheduler. |
| `gateway_scheduler_run_once` | operate | Run one scheduler cycle immediately. |
| `gateway_dispatch_now` | operate | Run a scheduler cycle now, dispatching ALL ready work up to maxConcurrent (not just one task). Honors a paused scheduler (truthful no-op when paused; resume it explicitly). A taskId/roadmapId ensures that target is eligible and highlights whether it dispatched, without hiding the rest of the cycle. Collapses scheduler_run_once + status. |
| `gateway_scheduler_configure` | admin | Update scheduler settings deterministically. |
| `gateway_profile_list` | read | List Gateway scheduler profiles. |
| `gateway_profile_inspect` | read | Inspect effective access, grants, and least-privilege warnings for one profile. |
| `gateway_profile_upsert` | admin | Create or update a Gateway scheduler profile. |
| `gateway_profile_delete` | admin | Delete a scheduler profile not referenced by stages. |
| `gateway_agent_catalog_list` | read | List the Agent Factory catalog of profiles, teams, and persisted blueprints. |
| `gateway_team_assemble` | admin | Assemble a deterministic bounded team from a blueprint without dispatching sessions. |
| `gateway_team_assignment_create` | operate | Create executable team assignments with scoped grants, budgets, evidence, gates, and receipts. |
| `gateway_team_assignment_list` | read | List durable team assignments with gate/review/completion receipts. |
| `gateway_team_assignment_get` | read | Get one durable team assignment with receipt history. |
| `gateway_team_assignment_receipt_record` | operate | Record a gate result, review outcome, or completion receipt for a team assignment. |
| `gateway_promotion_scorecard_list` | read | List scorecards for Gateway profiles or teams. |
| `gateway_promotion_scorecard_create` | operate | Create or update a profile/team scorecard from structured eval evidence. |
| `gateway_promotion_state` | read | Show promotion state and decision history for a profile or team. |
| `gateway_promotion_decide` | admin | Human-gated promote, deprecate, rollback, or block of a profile/team. |

## Agent Teams

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_agent_team_list` | read | List Gateway project-scoped agent teams. |
| `gateway_agent_team_get` | read | Get one agent team and its current references. |
| `gateway_agent_team_inspect` | read | Inspect effective team access, role/profile grants, and least-privilege warnings. |
| `gateway_agent_team_validate` | admin | Validate an agent team proposal without mutating config. |
| `gateway_agent_team_propose` | admin | Propose an agent team and open a human gate to apply it. |
| `gateway_agent_team_apply` | admin | Apply an agent team after an approved human gate. |
| `gateway_agent_team_bind` | admin | Bind an agent team to one roadmap or task after an approved human gate. |
| `gateway_agent_team_delete` | admin | Delete an unreferenced agent team after an approved human gate. |

## Blueprints

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_blueprint_catalog_list` | read | List persisted blueprint files with validation, diff summary, and source metadata. |
| `gateway_blueprint_preview` | operate | Validate a blueprint and return structured diff/preview without mutating anything. |
| `gateway_blueprint_preview_text` | operate | Validate a blueprint and return a readable diff/preview. |
| `gateway_blueprint_apply` | admin | Apply a valid blueprint after an approved human gate. |

## Initiatives (Roadmaps)

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_roadmap_create` | operate | Create a durable Initiative (roadmap). |
| `gateway_delegation_submit` | operate | Accept a DelegationRequest v1 and create/replay durable work with an idempotent receipt. |
| `gateway_roadmap_list` | read | List durable Initiatives (roadmaps). |
| `gateway_roadmap_get` | read | Get one Initiative by roadmap ID. |
| `gateway_roadmap_create_with_tasks` | operate | Create an Initiative and child Issues atomically. |
| `gateway_roadmap_update` | operate | Update Initiative title, status, or priority. |
| `gateway_roadmap_recompute` | operate | Recompute Initiative status from child Issue states. |
| `gateway_roadmap_memory` | read | Show bounded Initiative memory: decisions, evidence, failures, recent Issues. |
| `gateway_roadmap_completion_proposal_list` | read | List roadmap completion proposals. |
| `gateway_roadmap_completion_proposal_get` | read | Get one roadmap completion proposal. |
| `gateway_roadmap_completion_propose` | operate | Propose completion with evidence, residual risks, and recommendation. |
| `gateway_roadmap_completion_decide` | operate | Approve or reject a pending completion proposal. |
| `gateway_roadmap_archive` | operate | Archive an Initiative and its child Issues. |
| `gateway_roadmap_delete` | admin | Delete an Initiative and its child Issues/runs. |
| `gateway_roadmap_supervisor_list` | read | List durable Initiative Supervisors. |
| `gateway_roadmap_supervisor_get` | read | Get one Initiative Supervisor. |
| `gateway_roadmap_supervisor_create` | operate | Create an Initiative Supervisor for a roadmap and OpenCode session. |
| `gateway_roadmap_supervisor_update` | operate | Update supervisor profile, status, cadence, cursor, or policy. |
| `gateway_roadmap_supervisor_archive` | operate | Archive a roadmap supervisor. |

## Projects

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_project_binding_list` | read | List project aliases and channel/OpenCode surface bindings. |
| `gateway_project_binding_get` | read | Get one project binding. |
| `gateway_project_binding_upsert` | admin | Create or rebind a project alias to a roadmap, session, and optional surface. |
| `gateway_project_binding_update` | admin | Update a project binding. |
| `gateway_project_binding_delete` | admin | Delete a project binding. |
| `gateway_project_context_resolve` | read | Resolve current project context by alias, roadmap, session, or channel surface. |
| `gateway_project_create` | operate | Create a supervised project with roadmap, default supervisor, and alias binding. |
| `gateway_project_status` | read | Show project status for the resolved context. |
| `gateway_project_digest` | read | Show recent project events and decisions for the resolved context. |
| `gateway_project_review_now` | operate | Queue an immediate supervisor review for the resolved project. |
| `gateway_project_completion_decide` | operate | Approve or reject the resolved project's pending completion proposal. |
| `gateway_project_pause` | operate | Pause the resolved project's roadmap supervisor. |
| `gateway_project_resume` | operate | Resume the resolved project's roadmap supervisor. |

## Issues, Tasks, and Runs

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_task_create` | operate | Create a durable Issue (scheduler task). |
| `gateway_task_bulk_create` | operate | Create multiple Issues atomically. |
| `gateway_task_list` | read | List durable Issues (scheduler tasks). |
| `gateway_task_get` | read | Get an Issue by task ID. |
| `gateway_task_update` | operate | Update task fields deterministically. |
| `gateway_task_bulk_update` | operate | Update multiple tasks atomically. |
| `gateway_task_dependency_list` | read | List dependencies and readiness for a task. |
| `gateway_task_dependency_add` | operate | Add a dependency that must complete before a task can run. |
| `gateway_task_dependency_delete` | operate | Delete a task dependency. |
| `gateway_task_pause` | operate | Pause a task. |
| `gateway_task_resume` | operate | Resume a paused task. |
| `gateway_task_cancel` | operate | Cancel a task. |
| `gateway_task_retry` | operate | Retry a task. |
| `gateway_task_done` | operate | Mark a task done. |
| `gateway_task_block` | operate | Block a task. |
| `gateway_task_archive` | operate | Archive a task. |
| `gateway_task_delete` | admin | Delete a task and its runs. |
| `gateway_active_run_list` | read | List active runs with lease owner, heartbeat freshness, and cancel/restart eligibility. |
| `gateway_active_run_control` | operate | Apply one lease-safe active-run control: cancel, stop, retry, or restart. |
| `gateway_artifact_manifest_list` | read | List bounded local run artifact manifests with redacted refs and counts. |
| `gateway_artifact_manifest_get` | read | Get one bounded local run artifact manifest without raw file paths. |
| `gateway_run_list` | read | List recent scheduler runs. |
| `gateway_run_get` | read | Get a run by run ID or OpenCode session ID. |
| `gateway_environment_list` | read | List execution environments with backend, lease, cleanup, and artifact state. |
| `gateway_environment_get` | read | Inspect one execution environment by environment ID or run ID. |
| `gateway_environment_action` | operate | Retain, release, abort, or cleanup one execution environment. |
| `gateway_environment_reconcile` | operate | Reconcile stale execution environments and summarize cleanup state. |

## OpenCode Sessions

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_opencode_session_list` | read | List OpenCode sessions, optionally Gateway-only. |
| `gateway_opencode_session_get` | read | Get one OpenCode session and Web/TUI links. |
| `gateway_opencode_session_messages` | admin | Read recent messages for an OpenCode session. |
| `gateway_opencode_session_children` | read | List child sessions for an OpenCode session. |
| `gateway_opencode_session_web_url` | read | Return the OpenCode Web URL for a session, or fallback link text. |
| `gateway_opencode_session_abort` | admin | Abort an OpenCode session. |
| `gateway_agent_presence_list` | read | List always-on AgentPresence bindings. |
| `gateway_agent_presence_get` | read | Get one AgentPresence record. |
| `gateway_agent_presence_create` | admin | Create an AgentPresence sticky assistant binding. |
| `gateway_agent_presence_update` | admin | Update AgentPresence status/channel/session binding. |
| `gateway_session_admit` | admin | Capacity-gated OpenCode session admit (no free spawn). |

## OpenCode Assets

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_opencode_mcp_list` | read | List OpenCode MCP server config entries. |
| `gateway_opencode_mcp_upsert` | admin | Create or update an OpenCode MCP server config entry. |
| `gateway_opencode_mcp_delete` | admin | Delete an OpenCode MCP server config entry. |
| `gateway_opencode_tool_list` | read | List OpenCode custom tool files. |
| `gateway_opencode_tool_upsert` | admin | Create or update an OpenCode custom tool file. |
| `gateway_opencode_tool_delete` | admin | Delete an OpenCode custom tool file. |
| `gateway_opencode_agent_list` | read | List OpenCode-native agents. |
| `gateway_opencode_agent_upsert` | admin | Create or update an OpenCode-native agent. |
| `gateway_opencode_agent_delete` | admin | Delete an OpenCode-native agent. |
| `gateway_opencode_skill_list` | read | List OpenCode skills. |
| `gateway_opencode_skill_upsert` | admin | Create or update an OpenCode skill SKILL.md file. |
| `gateway_opencode_skill_delete` | admin | Delete an OpenCode skill directory. |
| `gateway_persona_list` | read | List OpenCode agents labeled as personas. |
| `gateway_persona_create` | admin | Create a primary-mode OpenCode agent persona. |

## Channels

| Tool | Tier | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gateway_channel_connector_status` | read | List channel connector setup status with redacted prerequisites and repair diagnostics. |
| `gateway_channel_binding_list` | read | List Telegram/WhatsApp channel bindings. |
| `gateway_channel_binding_get` | read | Get one channel binding. |
| `gateway_channel_binding_upsert` | admin | Create or update a channel binding. |
| `gateway_channel_binding_delete` | admin | Delete a channel binding. |
| `gateway_channel_send` | operate | Send a message to a specific configured channel chat. |
| `gateway_channel_send_to_task` | operate | Send a message to channels bound to a task or its roadmap. |
| `gateway_channel_send_to_roadmap` | operate | Send a message to channels bound to a roadmap. |
